description: Known as the Niagara Falls of India, it is the broadest waterfall in the country, located on the Indravati River. Stunning views during monsoon.
A beautiful block type waterfall on the Kanger River. The water plunges from a height of about 300 feet, making it a popular picnic spot.
An ancient city rich with archaeological monuments from the 5th to 8th centuries, famous for the Laxman Temple and Buddhist Viharas.
Often called the Khajuraho of Chhattisgarh, this 11th-century temple complex is dedicated to Lord Shiva and features intricate carvings.
A very popular zoo located near Bilaspur city, housing various wildlife species including tigers, lions, bears, and exotic birds. It's a prime picnic spot for families.
An ancient and highly revered Shakti Peeth dedicated to Goddess Mahamaya, built by the Kalachuri kings in the 12th century. A major pilgrimage site in Chhattisgarh.
One of the oldest archaeological sites in Chhattisgarh, known for the ancient Pataleshwar Kedar Temple and ruins dating back from the 10th to 12th century Kalachuri period.
A scenic reservoir and dam situated about 33 km from Bilaspur. Built across the Kharung river, it offers boating facilities and a very peaceful environment.
Asia's largest man-made Jungle Safari covering beautifully landscaped terrains with dedicated zones for herbivores, bears, tigers, and lions.
One of the oldest museums in India, built in 1875. It houses an extensive collection of ancient coins, sculptures, and inscriptions found across Chhattisgarh.
An incomplete yet magnificent ancient temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu. The intricate stone carvings clearly reflect the mastery of Kalachuri architecture.
A scenic spot situated near the Hasdeo River, known for its small historical ruins and beautiful picnic areas favored by locals.
A gorgeous waterfall located on the Ambikapur highway dropping from around 75 feet. Very popular stopover for tourists exploring northern Chhattisgarh.
A massive dam built across the Hasdeo River. The surrounding hills and large reservoir make it exceptionally beautiful and a great place for boating.
